title: WIZnet Command Group
description: Schema for specs/commands/*.yaml files. Command codes are dynamic keys matched by patternProperties.

meta.description: Module metadata (optional in Phase 1, populated in Phase 2).

description.description: Brief description of the module's purpose

requires.description: Other module IDs this module depends on

conflicts.description: Other module IDs that cannot be used with this module

^[A-Z0-9]{2}$.description: A single command entry keyed by its 2-character command code.

regex.description: Validation regex for command value. Empty string means no validation.

values.description: Allowed value map. Empty object ({}) for commands with no predefined values.

oneOf.description: UI hints. null for WO-only commands (SV, RT, FR, EX, UF). Internal fields are flexible.

ui.description: UI layout hints. null is valid for write-only commands.
